calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-29-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Patsy Meyers appearing as beneficiary. Counsel is not in court. Court finds it is not appropriate to use the retail value of the missing clock. Court is using 1/3 off the retail value for offset in the amount of $667.00. Ms. Meyers stated her objection. Matter granted. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-01-2006 Continued To Mar-29-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Micahel Keck appearing for executor. Patsy Meyers, beneficiary also appeared. Counsel has filed 3 receipts this morning. He has the white Limoges swan with him to be distributed to Ms. Meyers. He is requesting for continuance to file an amendment to address the issues. Ms. Meyers made a statement regarding the problems she had with getting her bequest. Court instructed Ms. Meyers to accept the swan. The executor will have to pay for the missing clock. Matter is continued to 3/29. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
